title: Water Cycle Explained
learning_objectives: Identify key stages of water cycle
Relate water cycle to real life
introduction: Imagine a trip around the world in water droplets

scenes.narration: Water from oceans, lakes, and rivers evaporates into the air like water from a hot cup on a cold day
As water vapor rises, it cools down and forms clouds, similar to how breath fogs up a mirror
When clouds get too heavy with water, they release it back to Earth as rain or snow, just like an overflowing bucket

conclusion: Water cycle repeats, keeping our planet full of life
quiz_question: What is the first stage of the water cycle?
